channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kraken assistant coach Jessica Campbell makes history as team falters in season opener
item.description: The Seattle Kraken lost their season opener on Tuesday night but Jessica Campbell made history as the first woman to serve behind the bench as an assistant coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kirk Cousins joined the 500-yard club but couldn't top Norm Van Brocklin's 73-year-old record
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lindor relishes his 1st home game in a month as Mets trounce Phillies for 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor waited a month to get back in the lineup at Citi Field. When he finally did Tuesday, was it everything he envisioned? “It was better,” Lindor said, flashing that signature smile. “Pretty cool. Pretty special." Playing at home for the first time since Sept.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mets beat Phillies 7-2 behind Alonso and Manaea to take 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pete Alonso launched another homer off Aaron Nola, and Sean Manaea took a two-hit shutout into the eighth inning as the New York Mets beat the Philadelphia Phillies 7-2 on Tuesday in Game 3 of their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Night vision view from helicopter gives wild perspective of viral Vanderbilt celebration with goalpost
item.description: The party was on in Nashville after unranked Vanderbilt defeated No. 1 Alabama on Saturday night, and night vision from a helicopter above caught it all.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Phillies one defeat from elimination after 7-2 loss to Mets in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Woman accusing Vince McMahon of sexual abuse asks WWE to waive confidentiality agreements
item.description: A former WWE employee who filed a lawsuit against the company and ex-leader Vince McMahon, accusing him of sexual battery and trafficking, is asking them to not enforce nondisclosure agreements with other former and current employees and contractors so they can potentially come forward with similar
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch Padres, Dodgers in NLDS
item.description: The Padres' postseason journey continues as the team gets ready to play their bitter rivals, the Los Angeles Dodgers, in the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Bears' rookie Tory Taylor named NFC Player of the Week
item.description: Tory Taylor of the Chicago Bears was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for his performance in the team's victory over the Los Angeles Rams, with a 55.4-yard average and three punts landing inside the 10-yard line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
